etymology.description: 𠀠 depicts a basket -> 丌 added as a stand to form 𠔝 -> original form of 箕
etymology.interpretation: 丌 (jī, 'table') is an ancient form of 其(其) (qí, 'his'), initially depicting a stand added under a basket in the character's evolution. This provided a visual representation of a stand for the basket, linking it to the notion of support or foundation, aligning with its meaning as ‘table’ or ‘stand.’
